home.organisateur: Create, manage, and promote your cultural events with ease. Your platform for organizing unforgettable experiences.
home.participant: Discover and participate in exciting cultural events. Join an engaged community and enjoy unique experiences.
home.visiteur: Organize, manage, and participate in your events with ease. A modern platform to create unforgettable experiences.

joincta.faitespartie: Be part of an engaged community.
joincta.joinsubtitle: Discover, organize, and share cultural events with ease. Membership is completely free.

signup.error_org_name_required: Organization name is required for organizers
signup.success_message: Registration successful! A verification email has been sent to {{email}}. Please check your inbox before logging in.

profile.nocreated: You haven't created any events yet.
profile.noparticipated: You haven't participated in any events.
profile.loginrequired: Please log in to view your profile.

deactivate.title: Deactivate my account
deactivate.org_warning: Your request will be sent to the admin. Once approved, your account will be deactivated and your participations will be deleted. You will receive a confirmation email.
deactivate.user_warning: Your account will be deactivated immediately. All your participations will be deleted. This action requires contacting support@invitini.tn to be reversed.
deactivate.org_desc: Sends a request to the admin. You will receive a decision email within 24 hours.
deactivate.user_desc: Your account will be immediately deactivated and your participations will be deleted.
deactivate.pending_msg: Your request is being processed. You will receive an email within 24 hours with our team's decision.
deactivate.done_msg: Your account has been deactivated. You will be logged out in a few seconds.

about.headerline: Invitini is a Tunisian platform dedicated to the discovery and management of cultural and educational events. We connect passionate organizers with curious participants.
about.mission2: We believe everyone deserves access to enriching cultural experiences. Invitini simplifies event creation, promotion, and management for organizers, while providing participants with a seamless and secure registration experience.
about.mission3: Whether it's a conference, an art workshop, a concert or an exhibition, our platform adapts to all event formats.
about.valuestext1: Events open to all, with no financial barriers for participants.
about.valuestext2: Each organizer is verified by our team before events are published.
about.valuestext3: We encourage all forms of cultural and artistic expression.
about.valuestext4: Supporting Tunisian cultural initiatives and local creators.
about.howitworks1text: Register as a participant or organizer. Verify your email to activate your account.
about.howitworks2text: Explore our catalogue of cultural and educational events, filter by category or date
about.howitworks3text: Register for an event and receive an email confirmation with all the details.
about.aboutctatext: Discover events near you or create your own.

contact.contactheadertext: A question, a suggestion or a problem? Our team will respond as soon as possible.
contact.successmsg: Message sent successfully! We will reply within 24 hours.
contact.faq1q: How do I become an organizer?
contact.faq1a: Sign up by choosing the "Organizer" role. Your account will be verified by our team within 24-48 hours.
contact.faq2a: Yes, registering for an event on Invitini is completely free for participants.
contact.faq3q: How do I confirm my participation?
contact.faq3a: After registering, you will receive an email with a confirmation link. Click it to validate your spot.
contact.faq4q: My event is not visible yet, why?
contact.faq4a: Each event is reviewed by our team before publication. This process generally takes less than 24 hours.

footer.tagline: The Tunisian platform for cultural and educational events.

The reset link is valid for 30 minutes.
